title: Refined Mineral Tonnage
query: SELECT SUM(Count) AS total FROM MiningRefined WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(Type_Localised, Type) AS label, SUM(Count) AS value FROM MiningRefined WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {total} tonnes of refined minerals extracted and processed during the report period. Platinum, Palladium, Gold, and other valuable cores represent the haul from laser mining; the volume tells the story of your time in the rings.
details.help: MiningRefined fires after each refining cycle with the mineral type and quantity. Count is tonnes per refining event. total drives the title as the total tonnage extracted.

tagLines: Refined mineral tonnage log compiled. The rings have been thoroughly worked.
Every ton on this chart is laser time, collector limpet patience, and refinery cycles.
Platinum, Palladium, Gold — the commodity markers of a successful mining expedition.
